_note: Seed subset of EU DSA Transparency Database aggregate counts. Aggregated by platform + decision_ground keyword. Real demo would query https://transparency.dsa.ec.europa.eu/api/v1/research with bulk parquet pre-loaded. Numbers are illustrative, drawn from publicly reported DSA TDB monthly aggregates (2024-2026).

ELECTORAL_INTEGRITY_RO.note: Coordinated with EC under DSA Art. 35 election-period mitigation request (RO presidential election). Documented in EC press release IP/24/6487.

FOREIGN_INTERFERENCE_DOPPELGANGER.note: Removals of content tied to the Doppelgänger campaign across EU member-state language variants.

AI_SYNTHETIC_MEDIA_UNLABELLED.note: TikTok added AI-generated-content labels under voluntary Code of Practice; AI Act Art. 50 enforcement begins 2 Aug 2026.

FOREIGN_INTERFERENCE_DOPPELGANGER.note: Meta has publicly reported takedowns of Doppelgänger network assets in its quarterly Adversarial Threat Reports.

ELECTION_DISINFORMATION_GENERAL.note: X received an EC fine in January 2026 of EUR 120M for DSA Art. 24 / Art. 34 breaches (researcher access, content moderation).
